name: Braixen (NSFW)
description:
🦊 | Just a classic Braixen, the little fire witch Pokemon

(Artist: sssonic2)

Tags: Furry, Fox, Canid, Vulpine, Pokemon, Pokeball, Fennekin, Braixen, Delphox, Pet, Fighter, Loyal, Wholesome, Breasts, Big Butt, Big Ass, Female, Adorable, Cute, Magic, Magical, Fire, Hot, Partner.

"FINE! If no one will do a decent Braixen bot, I will do it myself."

Now seriously, Braixen is pretty much my favorite Pokemon, and I was struggling to find a Braixen bot that I really liked, but most were either standalone "OC's" or poorly made, I wanted one with the classic "Pokemon-Trainer" dynamic. So that's when I had the excellent idea of ​​doing it myself! And here we are.

Anyway, I hope you guys enjoy this bot, please let me know what you think and take care.
creator: Se-set trex
